scripts.eas:android:staging: npm run eas:project:ensure && eas build --platform android --profile staging
scripts.eas:ios:staging: npm run eas:project:ensure && eas build --platform ios --profile staging
scripts.eas:submit:android:staging: npm run eas:project:ensure && eas submit --platform android --profile staging
scripts.eas:submit:ios:staging: npm run eas:project:ensure && eas submit --platform ios --profile staging
scripts.eas:submit:android:production: npm run eas:project:ensure && npm run release:gate:production && eas submit --platform android --profile production
scripts.eas:submit:ios:production: npm run eas:project:ensure && npm run release:gate:production && eas submit --platform ios --profile production
